data.title: RED: Write failing tests for validate-work CLI migration
data.description:
## Description
Create tests/skills/test-validate-work-cli-migration.sh asserting validate-work staging tests and prompts use @playwright/cli, not MCP tools.

Test functions:
- test_validate_work_no_mcp_tools: asserts validate-work/SKILL.md Sub-agent 5 references no browser_* MCP tools
- test_staging_prompt_uses_cli: asserts staging-environment-test.md uses CLI commands
- test_playwright_verification_uses_cli: asserts debug-everything/prompts/playwright-verification.md uses CLI
- test_preflight_and_validation: asserts pre-flight check and output validation present

All tests fail because files still reference MCP tools.

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test-validate-work-cli-migration.sh (CREATE)
- .test-index (EDIT)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/skills/test-validate-work-cli-migration.sh
- [ ] Contains at least 4 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" tests/skills/test-validate-work-cli-migration.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 4)}'
- [ ] All tests fail (RED)
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-validate-work-cli-migration.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "FAIL"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
